class.name: OTelDocument
class.brief_description: Serializes and deserializes OTel signal batches to OTLP JSON.
class.description: Converts spans, metrics, and logs between [OTelState] containers and OTLP/HTTP JSON payloads.

method.name: build_log_payload
method.description: Returns an OTLP-format Dictionary for the given resource, scope, and log array.

method.name: build_metric_payload
method.description: Returns an OTLP-format Dictionary for the given resource, scope, and metric array.

method.name: build_trace_payload
method.description: Returns an OTLP-format Dictionary for the given resource, scope, and span array.

method.name: deserialize_logs
method.description: Parses an OTLP JSON string and returns an [OTelState] containing the decoded log records.

method.name: deserialize_metrics
method.description: Parses an OTLP JSON string and returns an [OTelState] containing the decoded metrics.

method.name: deserialize_traces
method.description: Parses an OTLP JSON string and returns an [OTelState] containing the decoded spans.

method.name: serialize_logs
method.description: Serializes all logs in [param state] to an OTLP JSON string.

method.name: serialize_metrics
method.description: Serializes all metrics in [param state] to an OTLP JSON string.

method.name: serialize_traces
method.description: Serializes all spans in [param state] to an OTLP JSON string.
